phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso del teatro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del teh-AH-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora inizia lo spettacolo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah in-EE-tsah loh spet-TAH-koh-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un biglietto per l'opera, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah oon bee-LYET-toh per LOH-peh-rah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, ci sono visite guidate oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, chee SOH-noh VEE-zee-eh goo-ee-DAH-teh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si lascia il cappotto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see LAH-shah ee kap-POT-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cloakroom, just after entering.

responses.english: At the cloakroom, just after entering.
